# Name: # Multi-boot layout for 16 MB flash boards (LilyGo T-Embed CC1101).
#   ota_0  = this ESP32 Flipper Zero port  (default boot target)
#   spiffs = LittleFS scratch area used by Bruce at runtime
# Switching is done via esp_ota_set_boot_partition() + reboot from either
# firmware ("Other OS" menu entry: "Bruce" on our side
# otadata starts erased (0xFF) so the bootloader boots ota_0 by default.
# IMPORTANT: this exact table must be used by BOTH builds. patchBruce.py copies
# it over Bruce's custom_16Mb.csv. Bruce's PlatformIO build only uses it for the
# app-size limit check; flashing Bruce's firmware.bin to the ota_1 offset is done
